cells.rationale: Well-specified single-surface data-fidelity fix that mirrors a named existing decoder shape with a port-the-template test, routing to the everyday GPT tier with high band for the multibyte/torn-tail edge cases.

Subtle async-lifecycle correctness invariant (latch reset, bounded connect-timeout, hard-destroy teardown for flat RSS) with whole-TUI shared-client blast radius and a faithful terminate-without-close repro seam is a nameable intelligence-bound opus gate at contract-shaped xhigh.

Judgment-heavy user-facing TUI banner work (three-state transition table, wording, CONTEXT.md naming calls, ADR consolidation) across a shared render surface needs Claude taste and idiom-matching but no opus reason, so sonnet at the multi-file-feature default band.
